style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial decision diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents. A box on the left labelled A RECURRING TASK leads by arrow to a diamond labelled MORE THAN THREE TIMES A WEEK? A short NO branch loops back to a small box labelled DO IT BY HAND. The YES branch leads rightward to a box labelled BUILD AND DOCUMENT THE AGENT, then to a box labelled SHARE WITH THE UNIT. Beside the final box, three small identical workflow icons suggest the whole unit reusing it. A small caption reads THE RULE OF THREE. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people.
composed_prompt:
Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.

Subject: An editorial decision diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents. A box on the left labelled A RECURRING TASK leads by arrow to a diamond labelled MORE THAN THREE TIMES A WEEK? A short NO branch loops back to a small box labelled DO IT BY HAND. The YES branch leads rightward to a box labelled BUILD AND DOCUMENT THE AGENT, then to a box labelled SHARE WITH THE UNIT. Beside the final box, three small identical workflow icons suggest the whole unit reusing it. A small caption reads THE RULE OF THREE. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people.

The diagram must clearly communicate the structure described. Use crisp legible labels. No watermarks. No photo realism. Architectural diagram aesthetic.
